# Core Utils Index

Primary utility index for `app/Utils/*Util.php`.

## Use when

- You are changing shared helper behavior used by multiple controllers/modules.
- You need to find util ownership quickly before refactoring.

## Start here

- [app/Utils/](../../app/Utils/)
- [app/Http/Controllers/](../../app/Http/Controllers/)

This map is intentionally Util-focused. The first table lists the primary `*Util.php` classes, and the companion section below lists the remaining PHP files in `app/Utils/` so agents can see the full directory shape without assuming every file follows the Util naming pattern.

| Util | Purpose | Grep hint |
|---|---|---|
| [AccountTransactionUtil.php](../../app/Utils/AccountTransactionUtil.php) | Accounting transaction helper logic. | `rg -n 'AccountTransactionUtil|AccountTransaction' app routes Modules` |
| [BusinessUtil.php](../../app/Utils/BusinessUtil.php) | Business settings, context, and tenant-scoped helper logic. | `rg -n 'BusinessUtil|Business' app routes Modules` |
| [CalendarEventUtil.php](../../app/Utils/CalendarEventUtil.php) | Calendar event scheduling helpers. | `rg -n 'CalendarEventUtil|CalendarEvent' app routes Modules` |
| [CashRegisterUtil.php](../../app/Utils/CashRegisterUtil.php) | Cash register open/close/session helpers. | `rg -n 'CashRegisterUtil|CashRegister' app routes Modules` |
| [ContactFeedUtil.php](../../app/Utils/ContactFeedUtil.php) | Contact feed aggregation, provider sync, and enrichment helpers. | `rg -n 'ContactFeedUtil|ContactFeed' app routes Modules` |
| [ContactUtil.php](../../app/Utils/ContactUtil.php) | Contact CRUD helper logic and related business rules. | `rg -n 'ContactUtil|Contact' app routes Modules` |
| [GlobalSearchUtil.php](../../app/Utils/GlobalSearchUtil.php) | Shared global-search query helpers. | `rg -n 'GlobalSearchUtil|GlobalSearch' app routes Modules` |
| [HomeMetronicDashboardUtil.php](../../app/Utils/HomeMetronicDashboardUtil.php) | Dashboard metric and widget data helpers. | `rg -n 'HomeMetronicDashboardUtil|HomeMetronicDashboard' app routes Modules` |
| [InstallUtil.php](../../app/Utils/InstallUtil.php) | Installation and setup helper logic. | `rg -n 'InstallUtil|Install' app routes Modules` |
| [ModuleUtil.php](../../app/Utils/ModuleUtil.php) | Cross-module helper methods shared by enabled modules. | `rg -n 'ModuleUtil|Module' app routes Modules` |
| [NotificationUtil.php](../../app/Utils/NotificationUtil.php) | Notification dispatch and formatting helpers. | `rg -n 'NotificationUtil|Notification' app routes Modules` |
| [NumberFormatUtil.php](../../app/Utils/NumberFormatUtil.php) | Number formatting and locale helper logic. | `rg -n 'NumberFormatUtil|NumberFormat' app routes Modules` |
| [ProductActivityLogUtil.php](../../app/Utils/ProductActivityLogUtil.php) | Product detail activity logging helpers. | `rg -n 'ProductActivityLogUtil|ProductActivityLog' app routes Modules` |
| [ProductCostingUtil.php](../../app/Utils/ProductCostingUtil.php) | Product costing and margin helper logic. | `rg -n 'ProductCostingUtil|ProductCosting' app routes Modules` |
| [ProductUtil.php](../../app/Utils/ProductUtil.php) | Product CRUD, pricing, variation, and stock helper logic. | `rg -n 'ProductUtil|Product' app routes Modules` |
| [QuoteUtil.php](../../app/Utils/QuoteUtil.php) | Quote creation and update helper logic. | `rg -n 'QuoteUtil|Quote' app routes Modules` |
| [RestaurantUtil.php](../../app/Utils/RestaurantUtil.php) | Restaurant/table-service helper logic. | `rg -n 'RestaurantUtil|Restaurant' app routes Modules` |
| [SalesOrderEditUtil.php](../../app/Utils/SalesOrderEditUtil.php) | Sales-order edit and mutation helper logic. | `rg -n 'SalesOrderEditUtil|SalesOrderEdit' app routes Modules` |
| [TaxUtil.php](../../app/Utils/TaxUtil.php) | Tax calculation and normalization helpers. | `rg -n 'TaxUtil|Tax' app routes Modules` |
| [TransactionUtil.php](../../app/Utils/TransactionUtil.php) | Transaction-level shared business helpers. | `rg -n 'TransactionUtil|Transaction' app routes Modules` |
| [UnifiedQuoteListUtil.php](../../app/Utils/UnifiedQuoteListUtil.php) | Shared quote listing and hub query helpers. | `rg -n 'UnifiedQuoteListUtil|UnifiedQuoteList' app routes Modules` |
| [Util.php](../../app/Utils/Util.php) | General shared business helpers and formatting/parsing utilities. | `rg -n 'Util' app routes Modules` |

## Other files in app/Utils/

| File | Purpose | Grep hint |
|---|---|---|

| [PurchaseViewDataBuilder.php](../../app/Utils/PurchaseViewDataBuilder.php) | Support class for purchase view data builder. | `rg -n 'PurchaseViewDataBuilder' app routes Modules` |
| [QuoteDisplayPresenter.php](../../app/Utils/QuoteDisplayPresenter.php) | Quote display and presentation formatting helpers. | `rg -n 'QuoteDisplayPresenter|QuoteDisplay' app routes Modules` |

## Common edit bundles

- **Util + caller bundle** — [app/Utils/](../../app/Utils/), [app/Http/Controllers/](../../app/Http/Controllers/)

## Primary workflows

- **Util impact pass** — inspect util changes and at least one likely caller path before patching.

## Shared dependencies

- Root and module controllers commonly depend on `App\Utils\*Util`; verify constructor imports and call sites.

## Tests / verify

- [tests/Unit](../../tests/Unit)
- [tests/Feature](../../tests/Feature)
- `php artisan test --filter=Unit`
